geography_priority: Premium-resi suburbs (Sugar Land, Plano, Frisco, Westlake)
Tier-2 metros (Tyler, Longview, Waco, Killeen, Temple, El Paso, Lubbock, Corpus Christi, Galveston, New Braunfels, San Marcos)
primary_sources_attempted: PDCA / PCA national member directory (member.pdca.org/page/directory + www.pcapainted.org/member-directory)
Expertise.com painting-by-city pages (Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Fort Worth, Plano, McKinney, Sugar Land)
_meta.sourcing_notes: PDCA/PCA national directory was behind a state-filter form that WebFetch could not interact with, so direct member-list extraction was not possible. We instead used Expertise.com city pages + Google searches + per-company website verification. Cherry Coatings (1,250+ field staff) was explicitly EXCLUDED from this spine because it exceeds the 5-30 crew target and behaves more like a regional roll-up than a solo-owner shop. Smart Painting (Elgin TX, 50+ years, 350K+ multifamily units completed) likely exceeds the crew target as well but is retained as a 'large independent' edge case for scorer evaluation. All confirmed franchise locations (CertaPro, Five Star, College Pro, House Painters Inc, 360 Painting, PaintCo) were excluded. Where founded year was unstated, the field is null; do not fabricate.
exclusion_list: Southern Painting (multi-city Texas painter network — flagged as franchise-style operation)
Sherwin-Williams / Benjamin Moore (paint manufacturers, not contractors)
